About

HR expertise meets
precision assessment

I am a People Operations Specialist with over five years of hands-on HR experience across international, multi-country environments — including extensive work with German-speaking employee populations across EMEA.

My CV assessments are different because they are built on the same analytical rigour I applied managing HR data in Workday and SAP HCM, ensuring compliance, and delivering actionable insights to leadership. I know exactly what recruiters look for — because I have worked alongside them.

Every assessment combines my HR expertise with AI-powered analysis to optimise your CV for both ATS systems and human review, giving you the best possible chance of securing an interview.

Services

What I offer

Focused CV assessment services built on genuine HR expertise — not generic feedback, but the precise analysis a hiring manager would apply to your application.

01

Essential CV Assessment

A thorough evaluation of your current CV with written feedback covering structure, language, ATS compatibility, and overall impact.

Written assessment report Structure & layout analysis ATS compatibility check Priority action points

02

Targeted Role Assessment

Your CV assessed against a specific job description, with recommendations to align your application precisely to the role and sector.

Role-specific analysis Keyword alignment check Recruiter lens review Tailoring recommendations

03

Comprehensive Review

The most detailed assessment available — full written report combined with a 30-minute consultation call to discuss findings and next steps.

Full written report 30-minute video call Career positioning advice Follow-up Q&A support

Process

How it works

1

Submit your CV

Send your CV and a brief note about the role or sector you are targeting via the contact form below.

2

In-depth analysis

I conduct a thorough assessment covering structure, language, ATS fit, and market positioning.

3

Receive your report

A detailed written report delivered within 3 business days, with clear, prioritised recommendations.

4

Apply with confidence

Implement the improvements and approach your applications with a CV that truly represents your value.
